title: OpenAI just released its answer to Claude Mythos
summary: OpenAI launched Daybreak, a security initiative using the Codex Security AI agent to automatically detect and patch software vulnerabilities before attackers exploit them. The launch directly competes with Anthropic's Claude Mythos, a private security-focused model announced last month.
content:
OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them. Daybreak uses the Codex Security AI agent that launched in March to create a threat model based on an organization's code and focus on possible attack paths, validate likely vulnerabilities, and then automate the detection of the higher risk ones.
Its launch comes just over a month after rival Anthropic announced Claude Mythos, a security-focused AI model it claimed was too dangerous to publicly release and only shared privately as a part of its own initiative, dubbed Project Glasswing. Still, that didn't stop at leas …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI刚推出了应对Claude Mythos的方案
zh.summary: OpenAI推出了Daybreak安全措施，使用Codex安全AI代理在攻击者利用前自动检测和修补软件漏洞。该推出与Anthropic上月宣布的专注安全的私有模型Claude Mythos直接竞争。

title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
summary: General Motors is laying off hundreds of IT workers while hiring for AI-specialized roles including AI-native development, data engineering, and prompt engineering. This shift reflects the automotive industry's pivot toward AI-driven capabilities.
content: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

zh.title: GM裁员数百名IT员工，招聘AI技能更强的员工
zh.summary: 通用汽车正在裁减数百名IT员工，同时招聘AI专业岗位，包括AI原生开发、数据工程和提示工程。这反映了汽车行业向AI驱动能力的转向。

title: Yarbo says it will remove the intentional backdoor from its robot lawn mower
summary: Yarbo will completely remove the remote backdoor from its robot lawn mowers that previously allowed unauthorized reprogramming over the internet. Customers will now have the option to disable the feature entirely following security researchers' exposure of multiple vulnerabilities.
content:
The company behind the robot lawn mower that ran me over has changed its tune. Yarbo now plans to completely remove the remote backdoor access that could have let bad actors reprogram the robot over the internet. Yarbo customers will be able to decide whether that feature even gets installed in the first place, co-founder Kenneth Kohlmann pledges to The Verge.
Yarbo had already promised on Friday that it would tackle many security issues head-on, closing the holes that let security researcher Andreas Makris easily hijack any of the bladed robots from the other side of the globe, while also exposing email addresses and GPS locations. But whe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 雅博宣称将移除机器人割草机的刻意后门
zh.summary: 雅博将完全移除其机器人割草机中的远程后门,该后门之前允许通过互联网进行未授权的重新编程。在安全研究人员揭露了多个漏洞后,客户现在可以选择完全禁用该功能。

title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
summary: Linux is patching its second critical vulnerability in two weeks, with production patches becoming available. System administrators are urged to install patches immediately to protect against exploitation.
content: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.

zh.title: Linux在数周内遭遇第二个严重漏洞
zh.summary: Linux正在修补两周内的第二个关键漏洞,生产补丁即将推出。系统管理员被敦促立即安装补丁以防止被利用。

title: Here’s what Mira Murati’s AI company is up to
summary: Thinking Machines, founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, is developing "interaction models" enabling real-time AI collaboration through continuous audio, video, and text processing. Unlike current models that wait for input completion, these systems will perceive and respond simultaneously.
content:
Thinking Machines, the AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, announced Monday that it's working on something called "interaction models." The idea behind interaction models, according to Thinking Machines, is that they will let people "collaborate with AI the way we naturally collaborate with each other - they continuously take in audio, video, and text, and think, respond, and act in real time."
As explained by Thinking Machines:
Today's models experience reality in a single thread. Until the user finishes typing or speaking, the model waits with no perception of what the user is doing or how the user is doing it. Until th …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这就是Mira Murati的AI公司在做的事情
zh.summary: 由前OpenAI首席技术官Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines正在开发"交互模型",通过连续的音频、视频和文本处理实现实时AI协作。与等待输入完成的当前模型不同,这些系统将能够同时感知和响应。

title: Audi has a new Q9 flagship coming soon: Here's its interior
summary: Audi is preparing a new Q9 flagship full-size SUV with an interior specifically designed to appeal to American consumer preferences.
content: Audi made sure to consult American tastes for its first full-size SUV.

zh.title: 奥迪推出新款Q9旗舰车型即将推出：看看它的内饰
zh.summary: 奥迪正在准备一款新的Q9旗舰全尺寸SUV，其内饰专门设计用来吸引美国消费者的偏好。

title: Finally, texts between Android and iPhone users can be end-to-end encrypted
summary: Android and iPhone users can now exchange end-to-end encrypted text messages, fulfilling Google's long-standing push for Apple to adopt RCS texting. The move eliminates a major friction point in cross-platform communication.
content: Google had urged Apple for years to support RCS texting to make communication between each company's devices more seamless.

zh.title: 终于，Android和iPhone用户之间的短信可以端对端加密了
zh.summary: Android和iPhone用户现在可以交换端对端加密的文本消息，实现了谷歌长期推动苹果采用RCS短信的目标。这一举措消除了跨平台通信中的主要摩擦点。

title: After banning foreign routers, FCC says existing ones can get updates until 2029
summary: The FCC extended its waiver allowing existing foreign routers and drones to receive security updates through 2029, providing additional transition time after the initial ban. This permits affected devices to maintain patch availability during the phase-out period.
content: FCC extends waiver allowing routers and drones to get patches for two more years.

zh.title: 禁止外国路由器后，FCC表示现有路由器可以获得更新直到2029年
zh.summary: FCC延长了豁免权，允许现有的外国路由器和无人机在2029年之前继续接收安全更新，在初始禁令后提供额外的过渡时间。这允许受影响的设备在淘汰期间保持补丁可用性。

title: Data center guzzled 30 million gallons of water and nobody noticed for months
summary: A data center consumed 30 million gallons of water over months without detection, highlighting the massive environmental cost of AI infrastructure. The incident raises concerns about whether AI solutions can address the water scarcity crisis that the AI industry itself is exacerbating.
content: Can AI save us from the AI industry’s endless thirst for water? Outlook not so good.

zh.title: 数据中心在数月内消耗3000万加仑水而无人察觉
zh.summary: 一个数据中心在数月内消耗了3000万加仑的水而未被发现，突出了人工智能基础设施的巨大环保成本。该事件引发了对人工智能解决方案是否能解决由人工智能行业本身加剧的水资源短缺危机的担忧。

title: Govee’s new portable smart lamp is on sale for the first time
summary: Govee launched a portable smart lamp priced at $63.99 (currently on sale), offering a budget alternative to Philips Hue Go at less than half the cost. The lamp features a 4,800mAh battery lasting up to 30 hours with colors, 500 lumens brightness, Matter support, and AI-generated lighting effects via text prompts.
content:
If you’ve always liked the idea of the Philips Hue Go portable lamp but couldn’t justify the $100+ price tag, Govee recently released a much cheaper alternative, the Govee Table Lamp Classic, and it’s already receiving its first discount. Right now, you can pick the rechargeable smart lamp up at Amazon for $63.99 ($16 off), which makes it less than half the price of Philips’ portable smart lamp.
Govee Table Lamp Classic

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 at Amazon

The cordless lamp features a built-in 4,800mAh battery, which can last up to 30 hours with colored lighting enabled, though that drops to around five hours when using brighter white lighting. That’s not quite as long as the Philips Hue Go, which Philips says can last up to 48 hours on a charge, but on the flip side the Govee is brighter, delivering up to 500 lumens of brightness. It’s also lightweight enough to easily carry from room to room or bring outside, though you’ll want to be careful outdoors since it lacks the Philips Hue Go’s IP54 weather resistance rating for protection against rain and splashes.
In addition, the Govee supports adjustable color temperatures ranging from a warm 2700K to a cooler 6500K, and like with many of its smart lighting products, offers a slew of fun, colorful lights effects. You can have it sync to music while you’re hosting people, or switch between different preset scenes to set the mood, many of which are organized around specific moods and themes like “romance,” holidays, and more. Through Govee’s app, you can even type in prompts describing the vibe you want and the lamp will generate matching lighting effects for you. The lamp also supports Matter, meaning you can control it through major smart home platforms.

zh.title: Govee便携式智能灯首次降价销售
zh.summary: Govee推出了一款售价63.99美元的便携式智能灯(目前在促销中)，提供了比飞利浦Hue Go便宜不到一半的预算选择。该灯具有4800mAh电池，彩色显示可续航30小时，500流明亮度，支持Matter协议，以及通过文本提示生成的AI照明效果。

title: Palantir’s true believers are wearing this jacket
summary: Palantir, the defense contractor known for military and ICE contracts, added a $239 cotton chore coat to its merchandise store, available in bright blue and black. The jacket is styled after 19th-century French workwear and marks the company's expansion into branded consumer goods. This reflects increasing efforts by tech firms to build consumer-facing brand presence.
content:
In late April, Palantir - the software company that, in recent years, has perhaps become best known for its defense industry contracts and work with Immigration and Customs Enforcement - announced that it would be adding new products to its merch store. The latest offering was a cotton chore coat. 
At $239 and in bright blue and black options, the jacket looks like a standard offering that has, by way of photographer Bill Cunningham, trickled down into mainstream menswear for years. This jacket is a pastiche of 19th century French workwear that was worn by people actually doing physical labor; the only noticeable difference is that a dainty …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 帕兰蒂尔信徒穿的这款夹克
zh.summary: 因军事和移民部门合同而闻名的国防承包商帕兰蒂尔，在其商品店推出了一款价值239美元的棉质工作服外套，提供亮蓝色和黑色款。该夹克以19世纪法国工作服为灵感，标志着公司扩展到品牌消费品领域。这反映了科技公司越来越多地致力于建立面向消费者的品牌形象。

title: Passengers from hantavirus ship arrive in US; 3 people in biocontainment
summary: A cruise ship with hantavirus exposure has arrived in the US with three passengers in biocontainment after one tested "mildly positive" for the virus. The WHO is classifying the test result as "inconclusive" pending further investigation. The incident highlights ongoing disease transmission risks in cruise ship environments.
content: A US passenger tested "mildly positive," but WHO is calling it "inconclusive" for now.

zh.title: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客抵达美国；3人处于生物隔离中
zh.summary: 一艘遭汉坦病毒暴露的邮轮已抵达美国，其中三名乘客处于生物隔离状态，其中一人的病毒检测呈"轻度阳性"。世卫组织将该检测结果归类为"不确定"，等待进一步调查。该事件突显了邮轮环境中持续存在的疾病传播风险。

title: Apple brings encrypted RCS chats to iPhone
summary: Apple added end-to-end encrypted RCS messaging to iOS 26.5, enabling secure conversations between iPhone and Android users in the Messages app. The encryption is enabled by default and will automatically activate on new and existing RCS conversations for supported carriers. This improves privacy for cross-platform messaging by preventing Apple and Google from accessing messages in transit.
content:
Apple now lets you have encrypted RCS conversations with Android users through the Messages app on iOS. As part of iOS 26.5, which was released on Monday, Apple added support for end-to-end encrypted RCS messaging in beta, meaning that Apple and Google can't see your messages while they're sent. 
With iOS 26.5, you'll see a lock icon and a small "Encrypted" message at the top of the chat to note when you're having an encrypted conversation with an Android user and are on a carrier that supports the feature. Apple says that encryption will be on by default and "will be automatically enabled over time for new and existing RCS conversations."  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果为iPhone添加加密RCS聊天功能
zh.summary: 苹果在iOS 26.5中添加了端到端加密RCS聊天功能，使iPhone和Android用户能在Messages应用中进行安全对话。加密功能默认启用，将自动在支持的运营商的新建和现有RCS对话中激活。这通过防止苹果和谷歌访问传输中的聊天内容来改进跨平台聊天的隐私保护。

title: Starlink shuts down its GPS-style cheat code. Researchers may unlock it anyway.
summary: Starlink has shut down its GPS-alternative location feature that researchers were using as a workaround for GPS limitations. Researchers remain interested in GPS alternatives and may attempt to unlock the capability despite the company's shutdown. The move reflects the balance between corporate control and independent research in satellite technology.
content: Shutdown of Starlink location feature won’t dampen interest in GPS alternatives.

zh.title: Starlink 关闭其 GPS 风格的替代功能。研究人员可能仍会解锁它。
zh.summary: Starlink 已关闭其 GPS 替代位置功能，研究人员曾将其用作 GPS 限制的变通方案。研究人员仍对 GPS 替代品感兴趣，尽管公司已关闭该功能，但可能会尝试解锁该功能。此举反映了卫星技术中企业控制与独立研究之间的平衡。

title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
summary: European military drone startup Helsing, backed by Spotify founder Daniel Ek, is closing in on a $1.2 billion funding round at an $18 billion valuation. The five-year-old company specializes in autonomous defense systems and is one of Europe's leading defense tech firms. The funding reflects strong investor confidence in European military technology startups.
content: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

zh.title: Daniel Ek 支持的防卫科技公司 Helsing 将以 180 亿美元估值融资 12 亿美元
zh.summary: 由 Spotify 创始人 Daniel Ek 支持的欧洲军事无人机初创企业 Helsing 正接近完成一轮 12 亿美元融资，公司估值为 180 亿美元。这家成立五年的公司专门从事自主防卫系统，是欧洲领先的防卫科技公司之一。该融资反映了投资者对欧洲军事科技初创企业的强劲信心。

title: iOS, macOS, and iPadOS 26.5 updates arrive with encrypted RCS messaging and more
summary: Apple released iOS, macOS, and iPadOS 26.5 updates featuring encrypted RCS messaging support and additional improvements. These updates are expected to be the last major releases before new versions debut at WWDC. The updates bring enhanced privacy features to cross-platform messaging.
content: Probably the last big updates we'll see before the next versions appear at WWDC.

zh.title: iOS、macOS 和 iPadOS 26.5 更新发布，支持加密 RCS 消息等功能
zh.summary: Apple 发布了 iOS、macOS 和 iPadOS 26.5 更新，支持加密 RCS 消息传递和其他改进。这些更新预计将是 WWDC 新版本发布前的最后一次主要更新。这些更新为跨平台消息传递带来了增强的隐私功能。

title: Samsung made a “mockery” of Dua Lipa by putting her picture on TV boxes, lawsuit says
summary: Dua Lipa is suing Samsung for using her image on TV boxes without permission, claiming it contributed significantly to Samsung's revenue. The lawsuit alleges Samsung made a "mockery" of the artist by appropriating her likeness for commercial purposes without consent. The case highlights ongoing disputes over celebrity image rights in commercial advertising.
content: Lipa says her picture contributed to Samsung's "enormous revenue."

zh.title: 三星因在电视盒上使用杜娅·利帕照片被控"嘲弄"歌手
zh.summary: 杜娅·利帕起诉三星未经许可在电视盒上使用其形象，声称这为三星的收入做出了重大贡献。诉讼指控三星通过未经同意为商业目的挪用艺术家的肖像来"嘲笑"该艺术家。该案凸显了关于名人在商业广告中形象权的持续纠纷。

title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
summary: Peacock announced two new unscripted Bravo microdramas as the streaming service enters the rapidly growing short-form drama market. Competitors like ReelShort and DramaBox have quietly accumulated billions in revenue through microdrama content. The move shows traditional media companies adapting to compete in the microdrama space.
content: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

zh.title: Bravo正在为Peacock应用制作非脚本式微短剧
zh.summary: Peacock宣布推出两部新的Bravo非脚本式微短剧，因为该流媒体服务正进入快速增长的短剧市场。ReelShort和DramaBox等竞争对手通过微短剧内容悄悄累积了数十亿美元的收入。此举显示传统媒体公司正在调整战略以在微短剧领域竞争。

title: Texas sues Netflix for advertising ‘bait and switch’ and spying
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton sued Netflix over alleged "bait and switch" advertising and data privacy violations. The lawsuit claims Netflix broke promises to remain ad-free and safe for children while exposing user data to advertising companies it previously criticized. The legal action challenges Netflix's ad-supported tier strategy and data-sharing practices.
content:
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit against Netflix, accusing the company of turning its back on its promise to remain ad-free and safe for kids. The lawsuit, filed on Monday, claims Netflix has "opened Texans' data for inspection by the same Big Ad Tech community it once criticized for exploiting users in this same way."
In the lawsuit, Paxton claims Netflix drove up subscriptions by promoting its platform as an "escape from Big Tech surveillance." But that changed when Netflix introduced an ad-supported streaming plan in 2022, something co-founder Reed Hastings promised not to do. Its move into digital advertising allowe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 德州以虚假广告和隐私侵犯为由起诉Netflix
zh.summary: 德州司法部长肯·帕克斯顿因涉嫌"诱饵转换"广告和数据隐私违规起诉Netflix。诉讼声称Netflix违反了保持无广告和对儿童安全的承诺，同时向其之前批评过的广告公司泄露用户数据。该诉讼挑战Netflix的广告支持订阅层策略和数据共享做法。

title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
summary: Digg has relaunched as an AI-powered news aggregator, returning to the digital media landscape after previous ventures. The platform now focuses specifically on curating AI-related news and stories. The reinvention represents Digg's attempt to establish relevance in the modern AI-driven information ecosystem.
content: Digg returns (again) as another place to read AI news.

zh.title: Digg再次尝试，这次作为AI新闻聚合器
zh.summary: Digg已重新启动为AI驱动的新闻聚合器，在之前的企业之后重新进入数字媒体领域。该平台现在专门专注于策划AI相关的新闻和故事。这次改造代表了Digg在现代AI驱动的信息生态系统中建立相关性的尝试。

title: Google stopped a zero-day hack that it says was developed with AI
summary: Google's Threat Intelligence Group discovered and stopped a zero-day exploit that attackers developed using AI assistance, marking the first documented case of an AI-developed vulnerability. The exploit targeted popular open-source administration tools and showed telltale signs of AI generation including hallucinated CVSS scores and textbook formatting. The discovery highlights emerging cybersecurity threats posed by AI-assisted exploit development.
content:
For the first time, Google says it has spotted and stopped a zero-day exploit developed with AI. According to a report from Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG), "prominent cyber crime threat actors" were planning to use the vulnerability for a "mass exploitation event" that would have allowed them to bypass two-factor authentication on an unnamed "open-source, web-based system administration tool." 
Google's researchers found hints in the Python script used for the exploit that indicated help from AI, like a "hallucinated CVSS score" and "structured, textbook" formatting consistent with LLM training data. The exploit takes advantage of  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌阻止了据称由AI开发的零日漏洞攻击
zh.summary: 谷歌威胁情报小组发现并阻止了攻击者使用AI协助开发的零日漏洞，标志着AI开发漏洞的首个有文件记录的案例。该漏洞针对流行的开源管理工具，并表现出AI生成的明显迹象，包括虚构的CVSS分数和教科书式的格式。这一发现突出了AI辅助漏洞开发所带来的新兴网络安全威胁。

title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
summary: Battery-recycling company Redwood Materials hired Deepak Ahuja, Tesla's former CFO, as its incoming chief financial officer. The appointment reunites Ahuja with founder JB Straubel, Tesla's former CTO, signaling confidence in the company's trajectory. Leadership emphasized it remains too early to discuss potential IPO timelines.
content: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

zh.title: "现在谈论IPO还为时过早"，Redwood Materials即将上任的CFO表示
zh.summary: 电池回收公司Redwood Materials聘请了特斯拉前CFO Deepak Ahuja担任其即将上任的首席财务官。这次任命使Ahuja与创始人JB Straubel（特斯拉前CTO）重聚，表明对公司发展轨迹的信心。领导层强调，现在讨论潜在IPO时间表还为时过早。

title: A million baby monitors and security cameras were easily viewable by hackers
summary: Over a million Meari baby monitors and security cameras were vulnerable to unauthorized access due to severe security flaws. The vulnerability allowed malicious actors to easily view live streams of children and home interiors. The incident underscores critical security gaps in IoT devices marketed for child safety and home monitoring.
content:
If your baby monitor looks something like this, it’s probably a Meari. | Image: Meari	

A baby's eyes peer directly into the camera lens. A kid with a striped shirt looks up, then away. A boy in a policeman's costume, a gold star on his chest. A messy bedroom that reminds me of my own daughters, with an unmade bunk bed, a little girl's hat and headband, and Hello Kitty plastered on the wall.
One thought repeats in my mind: I shouldn't be seeing this. No stranger should. 
But bad actors could've easily spied on all these locations - and a million more - because many of Meari Technology's Wi-Fi baby monitors and security cameras were absurdly insecure. If you had access to one of those cameras, you theoretically had access to t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 百万台婴儿监护器和安全摄像头容易被黑客查看
zh.summary: 超过一百万台Meari婴儿监护器和安全摄像头由于严重的安全漏洞易受未授权访问。该漏洞使恶意行为人能够轻易查看儿童和家庭内部的实时视频流。该事件凸显了作为儿童安全和家庭监控设备销售的物联网设备存在的关键安全漏洞。

title: 7 of our favorite deals from Amazon’s Pet Days sale
summary: Amazon's Pet Days sale offers discounted pet supplies and accessories running through May 16th, featuring deals like the Bissell Little Green carpet cleaner at $99.99, down from $129.99. The five-day event provides numerous discounts on pet care products and home cleaning equipment. The seasonal promotion targets pet owners seeking deals on supplies and accessories.
content:
The Little Green carpet cleaner can do more than just suck up unmentionable pet-created disasters. It’s great for getting out coffee stains, too. | Image: Bissell	

A big part of my job here at The Verge is to find deals on tech that readers will like. But in my personal life, I’m not spending anywhere near as much money on tech as I am on food, litter, and other supplies for our two cats. Sad, but true. If your life is also ruled by furry (or feathered, scaled, shelled) friends, perhaps your interest will be piqued by Amazon’s five-day Pet Days sale happening through 2:59AM ET on Saturday, May 16th.
There are a ton of products available that have some sort of discount attached — too many to list out individually. In case you don’t want to sort through all of the deals, I’ve attempted to do you the favor of plucking out seven noteworthy discounts for cat and dog parents.
The product I recommend to all pet owners is Bissell’s Little Green upholstery and carpet cleaner, which is $99.99 at Amazon (originally $129.99). It’s the fighter you need on your side to help you get nasty stains out of your carpeted floors and stairs, rugs, couch cushions, and more. The portable cleaner works with Bissell’s cleaning formula, and the purchase includes a sample of the product. It also comes with a cleaning brush and crevice tool for sucking yucky stuff out of corners.
While not a quiet machine to use, it’s valuable in that it’s a way to undo your pet’s accidents (it’s great for getting out coffee stains, too). 
Bissell Little Green carpet cleaner

Where to Buy:

 $129.99 $99.99 at Amazon

Pet owners have a special connection to their animals, and many can intuit what their pets need based on how they’re trying to get our attention. But wouldn’t it be great if your pet could put in a little more effort? I’m not saying that this 10-pack of voice-recording buttons will suddenly turn your pet into Sapphie, but at $19.76 (just a few bucks off) for the kit at Amazon, it seems fun to try.

zh.title: 亚马逊宠物日特卖中我们最喜欢的7笔交易
zh.summary: 亚马逊宠物日特卖提供折扣宠物用品和配件，活动持续至5月16日，包括比赛威小绿地毯清洁机从129.99美元降价至99.99美元等优惠。为期五天的活动为宠物护理产品和家庭清洁设备提供众多折扣。这个季节性促销针对寻求宠物用品和配件优惠的宠物主人。

title: Pirates are already playing Forza Horizon 6 days before its launch
summary: Pirates obtained and began playing Forza Horizon 6 before its official launch by exploiting unencrypted files that briefly appeared on Steam. The early unauthorized distribution demonstrates vulnerabilities in the game's pre-release security measures. The incident raises concerns about digital protection effectiveness for major game releases.
content: Crackers take advantage of unencrypted files that briefly appeared on Steam.

zh.title: 盗版者已在《极限竞速地平线6》正式发布前数天开始游玩
zh.summary: 盗版者通过利用Steam上短暂出现的未加密文件，在《极限竞速地平线6》正式发布前获得并开始游玩该游戏。早期的未授权分发暴露了游戏预发布安全措施中的漏洞。该事件引发了对大型游戏发行版数字保护有效性的担忧。

title: F1 set for another engine tweak in 2027, and what's this about V8s?
summary: Formula 1 is proactively modifying engine regulations for 2027 rather than reacting to problems as they emerge. The changes may involve V8 engine adjustments to the current technical regulations.
content: Rather than dig in, the sport is being proactive about fixing the problem.

zh.title: F1计划在2027年进行发动机调整，V8引擎成关注焦点
zh.summary: 一级方程式正在主动修改2027年的发动机规则，而不是对问题被动作出反应。这些变化可能涉及对现行技术规则中V8发动机的调整。

title: NYT’s Wordle to become a TV game show
summary: The New York Times is adapting Wordle into a television game show, marking the company's first collaboration with a TV broadcaster for entertainment content. The move reflects the Times' ongoing efforts to diversify revenue streams as print advertising continues declining.
content: This will be the first time that The Times has collaborated with a TV broadcaster for an entertainment-based program, representing yet another pivot in the media company's attempt to build a sustainable digital subscription business as print revenue continues to decline.

zh.title: 纽约时报的Wordle将成为电视游戏节目
zh.summary: 纽约时报正在将Wordle改编成电视游戏节目，这是该公司与电视广播公司首次在娱乐内容方面的合作。此举反映了时报在印刷广告持续下滑之际多元化收入来源的持续努力。

title: TikTok launches an ad-free subscription plan in the UK
summary: TikTok launched an ad-free subscription tier in the UK where users neither see advertisements nor have their data used for ad targeting. The subscription option gives users control over their ad experience on the platform.
content: Users who sign up for the plan won’t see ads on TikTok, and their data won’t be used for advertising purposes.

zh.title: TikTok在英国推出无广告订阅计划
zh.summary: TikTok在英国推出了无广告订阅级别，用户既看不到广告，其数据也不会用于广告定向。该订阅选项让用户能够控制他们在平台上的广告体验。

title: A promising Indian launch startup nears its first orbital test flight
summary: An Indian launch startup is approaching its first orbital test flight as it works toward developing a full orbital launch vehicle. The company aims to achieve orbital capability within the near term.
content: "We wanted to get to an orbital launch vehicle in a few years."

zh.title: 一家有前景的印度航天初创公司接近其首次轨道测试飞行
zh.summary: 一家印度航天初创公司正在接近其首次轨道测试飞行，同时致力于开发完整的轨道发射车。该公司的目标是在近期内实现轨道能力。

title: TikTok is letting UK users pay to remove ads
summary: TikTok is launching a paid subscription in the UK for £3.99/month that removes ads and limits data use for advertising purposes, a response to GDPR and UK privacy regulations requiring explicit consent for user data collection.
content:
TikTok is preparing to roll out a paid, ad-free version of its app in the UK. The new subscription announced today will be available to users over 18 "over the coming months," according to TikTok's announcement, and will cost £3.99 (about $5.40) per month. In exchange for that, TikTok will remove ads from the user's feed, and promises to not use their data for undefined "advertising purposes".
This "pay or consent" model is likely in response to the UK's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other privacy laws that forbid companies from harvesting personal data for advertising without getting explicit consent from social media users …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: TikTok允许英国用户付费移除广告
zh.summary: TikTok在英国推出每月£3.99的付费订阅，可移除广告并限制用于广告目的的数据使用，这是对《通用数据保护条例》和英国隐私法规要求用户明确同意数据收集的回应。

title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers. Cowboy Space raised $275 million to build them.
summary: Cowboy Space Corporation has raised $275 million to build orbital data centers and the rockets needed to launch them, addressing a shortage of launch capacity for space-based infrastructure.
content: Cowboy Space Corporation wants to put data centers in orbit. First, it has to build the rockets to get them there.

zh.title: 空间数据中心缺少火箭，牛仔空间公司筹集2.75亿美元来建造它们
zh.summary: 牛仔空间公司筹集了2.75亿美元用于建造轨道数据中心及发射所需的火箭，以解决空间基础设施发射能力短缺问题。

title: Discord launches Nitro Rewards, giving subscribers access to the base tier of Xbox Game Pass for no extra cost
summary: Discord launched Nitro Rewards, a program bundling benefits from third-party partners including Microsoft, Logitech, and SteelSeries, with Nitro subscribers receiving Xbox Game Pass base tier at no extra cost.
content: Discord's Nitro Rewards program will give Nitro subscribers access to Xbox Game Pass, and discounts from Logitech, SteelSeries, and other gaming brands.

zh.title: Discord推出Nitro奖励计划，为订户免费提供Xbox Game Pass基础版
zh.summary: Discord推出了Nitro奖励计划，汇集来自微软、罗技和赛睿等第三方合作伙伴的福利，Nitro订户可免费获得Xbox Game Pass基础版。

title: Discord adds a free Xbox Game Pass ‘starter edition’ for Nitro subscribers
summary: Discord's Nitro Rewards program includes Xbox Game Pass starter edition, which provides access to 50+ games, 10 hours monthly of Cloud Gaming, and up to $25 yearly in Xbox Store rewards for subscribers.
content:
Discord is announcing the launch of Nitro Rewards today, a new program for subscribers that bundles benefits from third parties like Microsoft, Logitech, and SteelSeries, into a Nitro subscription. The main addition is that Nitro members will now get a new starter edition of Xbox Game Pass at no extra cost.
Xbox Game Pass starter edition, which leaked last month, allows PC and Xbox owners to download more than 50 games, including titles like Fallout 4, Stardew Valley, and DayZ. The starter edition also includes 10 hours a month of Xbox Cloud Gaming streaming and the ability to earn up to $25 a year in the Xbox Store with rewards.
Alongside …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Discord为Nitro订阅者提供免费Xbox Game Pass初级版
zh.summary: Discord的Nitro奖励计划包括Xbox Game Pass初级版本，为订阅者提供50多款游戏访问权限、每月10小时云游戏以及每年最高25美元的Xbox商店奖励。

title: Wordle is turning into a primetime TV game show on NBC
summary: NBC has greenlit a primetime Wordle game show debuting in 2027 with Savannah Guthrie as host, featuring teams competing in a fast-paced format to solve five-letter word puzzles.
content:
Wordle could be the next great game show. NBC has greenlit a game show version of The New York Times' popular puzzle game, and it's set to debut in 2027 with Savannah Guthrie as the host. The show will be produced by Universal Television Alternative Studio "in partnership with" Jimmy Fallon's production company and the NYT, according to a press release.
Here's an overview of how the new "fast-paced format" will work in game show form, from the NYT:
The series will feature teams of players competing to solve five-letter word puzzles in a high-energy, collaborative environment, translating the core elements of Wordle into a new kind of view …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Wordle将成为NBC黄金时段电视游戏节目
zh.summary: NBC已批准推出黄金时段Wordle游戏节目，将于2027年首播，由萨凡纳·古瑟里主持，参赛队伍将在快节奏的竞赛中解答五字谜题。

title: Venmo’s biggest makeover in years comes at a very interesting time
summary: Venmo is undergoing a major redesign as PayPal restructures to spin it off as a standalone unit, a move widely seen as laying groundwork for a potential sale with Stripe reportedly expressing interest.
content: The timing is notable. PayPal, which owns Venmo, is restructuring to spin Venmo off as a standalone business unit — a move widely seen as laying the groundwork for a potential sale. Stripe has reportedly expressed interest in buying PayPal outright.

zh.title: Venmo多年来最大改版在关键时刻推出
zh.summary: Venmo正在进行大规模重新设计，同时PayPal进行重组将其分拆为独立公司，此举被广泛视为为潜在出售做准备，据报道Stripe已表示有兴趣。

title: Venmo finally takes privacy seriously
summary: Venmo's redesign will set new users' posts to private by default instead of public, addressing long-standing privacy issues highlighted in 2021 when President Biden's account was publicly located.
content:
Venmo is starting to test a big redesign of its app, and as part of the changes, it will be implementing a major new privacy measure: the onboarding process for new users will set their posts to only be viewable by their friends by default instead of being public.
It's a notable update for a platform that has struggled with privacy in the past. In 2021, BuzzFeed News tracked down President Joe Biden's Venmo account and the accounts of people in his inner circle because Venmo, at the time, had no way to keep your Venmo contacts private. It fixed that soon after.
As part of the redesign, if you're a new user and you do want  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Venmo终于认真对待隐私问题
zh.summary: Venmo的重新设计将把新用户的帖子默认设为私密而非公开，解决了2021年总统拜登账户被公开定位时所突出的长期隐私问题。

title: Windows 11 is getting a macOS-like speed boost
summary: Microsoft is testing a "Low Latency Profile" feature in Windows 11 that boosts CPU frequency in short bursts to improve app launch and menu responsiveness, mirroring macOS performance optimizations.
content:
Microsoft is currently testing a new speed boost feature in Windows 11 that is designed to improve app launch times and make things like the Start menu feel more responsive. The feature, which is reportedly called "Low Latency Profile," will ramp up CPU frequency in short bursts to improve the speed of menus, flyouts, apps, and more - much like how macOS handles similar tasks.
Windows 11 testers have been trying out the new unannounced feature over the past week, and noticing significant speed improvements launching File Explorer or the Start menu, as well as apps like Outlook, the Microsoft Store, and Paint.


TESTED: Windows 11's upcoming …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Windows 11获得类似macOS的速度提升
zh.summary: 微软正在Windows 11中测试"低延迟配置文件"功能，通过短时间内提高CPU频率来改进应用启动和菜单响应速度，镜像macOS性能优化。

title: Sony's failed war against Internet piracy may doom other copyright lawsuits
summary: Cable firm Cox's Supreme Court victory against Sony over internet piracy liability may set a precedent affecting other copyright lawsuits beyond ISP-specific cases.
content: Cable firm Cox's Supreme Court win may help all tech providers, not just ISPs.

zh.title: 索尼对互联网盗版的失败战争可能导致其他版权诉讼失败
zh.summary: 有线电视公司Cox在互联网盗版责任问题上对索尼的最高法院胜利可能会设立先例，影响超出ISP特定案例的其他版权诉讼。

title: Korea’s biggest manufacturers back Config, the TSMC of robot data
summary: Samsung, Hyundai, and LG have backed Config, a startup positioning itself as the data backbone for robotics manufacturing, analogous to TSMC's role in semiconductor production.
content: Samsung, Hyundai and LG just bet on the startup that wants to be robotics' data backbone.

zh.title: 韩国最大制造商支持Config，被誉为机器人数据领域的"台积电"
zh.summary: 三星、现代和LG已支持Config，这是一家初创公司，将自己定位为机器人制造的数据支柱，类似于台积电在半导体生产中的作用。

title: Forza Horizon 6 has been leaked and cracked a week before its release
summary: Forza Horizon 6 leaked online and was cracked a week before its May 19 release, with over 150GB of game files appearing on file-sharing sites after Steam preload access was obtained.
content:
The full version of Playground Games' upcoming Forza Horizon 6 game has leaked online over the weekend and has already been cracked by pirates. The download appeared on file sharing sites after some Steam users were allegedly able to obtain access to an unencrypted preload version of the game.
Forza Horizon 6 isn't supposed to launch until May 19th on Xbox Series S / X and PC, but cracks to bypass online checks in the game are already widely available. Reddit users first noticed that games files, totaling more than 150GB, had appeared online yesterday, before Reddit's legal operations team removed the post.
Earlier this year a pre-release  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《极限竞速：地平线6》在发布前一周遭泄露并被破解
zh.summary: 《极限竞速：地平线6》在5月19日发布前一周在线泄露并被破解，超过150GB的游戏文件在获得Steam预加载访问权限后出现在文件共享网站上。

title: Logitech’s tiny folding mouse improves upon the laptop trackpad
summary: Logitech is developing a wireless foldable mouse that reduces muscle strain by 22% compared to trackpads, with a design similar to Microsoft's Surface Arc and Lenovo's Yoga mice.
content:
You might think this looks like a phone at first glance, but it isn’t — it’s a mouse that’s folded in half. | Images by Logitech / shared by WinFuture	

Logitech is reportedly developing a new wireless mouse that folds in half to make it easier to carry around in a bag or pocket. According to leaked marketing images shared by WinFuture, Logitech's foldable mouse caused "22 percent less muscle strain" compared to using a laptop trackpad, and can be used across "multiple operating systems."
Logitech's design is visually similar to Microsoft's Surface Arc mouse and Lenovo's Yoga mouse, sporting the same arched shape when unfolded for use. One key difference is that while Microsoft and Lenovo's offerings can only be folded flat, the new Logitech mouse - the name of which is still unknown - fold …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 罗技的小型折叠鼠标改善了笔记本电脑触控板
zh.summary: 罗技正在开发一款无线可折叠鼠标，与触控板相比能减少22%的肌肉疲劳，设计类似于微软的Surface Arc和联想的Yoga鼠标。
